# gs run precommit-checks auto-detects mise tasks from mise.toml
# when no .gitspice/precommit.yaml is present.
# A fake 'mise' binary echoes its arguments so the test can verify
# which tasks were invoked.

as 'Test <test@example.com>'
at '2026-05-04T12:01:00Z'

cd repo
git init
git commit --allow-empty -m 'Initial commit'
gs repo init

git checkout -b feature
gs branch track --base main

# Install a fake 'mise' binary that records invocations.
mkdir $WORK/bin
cp $WORK/extra/mise $WORK/bin/mise
chmod 755 $WORK/bin/mise
env PATH=$WORK/bin:$PATH

# Write a mise.toml with [tasks.lint] and [tasks.test] headers.
cp $WORK/extra/mise.toml mise.toml
git add mise.toml
gs cc -m 'test: add mise.toml'

# No .gitspice/precommit.yaml — should auto-detect from mise.toml.
gs run precommit-checks
stderr 'mise run lint'
stderr 'mise run test'

-- repo/.keep --
-- extra/mise.toml --
[tasks.lint]
run = "echo lint-ok"

[tasks.test]
run = "echo test-ok"
-- extra/mise --
#!/bin/sh
echo "mise run $*"
